title: Height of Binary Tree
text:
Given an array representing a complete binary tree in level order (-1 for null), compute its height. The height of a tree with only the root is 1 (counting nodes).

Input format:
a₁ a₂ ... aₙ -1 for null nodes

Output format:
A single integer

Example:
Input:
1 2 3 4 -1 -1 5

Output:
3
starter_code:
def solve():
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    # Compute the height of the binary tree

solve()
